Configuration for a Node.js-based CLI compiler with dependencies.

# Purpose
The JSON configuration file defines metadata and dependencies for a Node.js-based compiler named `js_compiler`. It specifies the compiler's version as `0.0.1` and lists development dependencies required for command-line interface (CLI) based compiling. The dependencies include `node-zip` version `^1.1.1` and `yargs` version `^4.7.1`. The `__comment` field provides additional context, indicating that these settings are necessary only for the Node.js version of the compiler when CLI-based compiling is desired.
